title: selaginella vestiens
intro: Selaginella vestiens, a type of ancient, non-vascular plant also known as resurrection plant, has the unique ability to revive itself from a desiccated state. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella vestiens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and act as an antioxidant. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
